meaning: n.溶度,溶性,可解决性,可解释性,溶解性
examples: The results showed that he solubility of xylitolincreased with adding impurities such as sorbitol or adonitol.
The solubility of carbamazepine-saccharin cocrystal was determined by a static method basing on the principle of solubility product.
The solubility, stability in gastrointestinal tract, membrane permeability and presystemic metabolism of drugs were the major factors on oral drug absorption.
Nanoscale materials are being used to address current drug delivery shortcomings, including water solubility, ADME (absorption, distribution, metabolism, and excretion) and toxicity.
